_comment: Global configuration for the Talent Inbox Automation system. Fill in all TODO values before deploying.

openai._triage_model_comment: Use gpt-4o-mini for triage (cheaper, nearly as accurate). Switch to gpt-4o only if quality drops.
openai._reply_model_comment: Always use gpt-4o for reply drafting — quality matters here.
openai._temperature_comment: Low temperature for triage = consistent, deterministic scoring.

triage._global_minimum_rate_comment: TODO: Set a global dollar floor (e.g. 50). Any offer below this = Score 1 regardless of brand. Set to 0 to disable.

reply._send_delay_comment: Minutes to wait after drafting before sending. Set to 0 to disable. Keep at 15 during Phase 2 testing.

digest._send_time_comment: TODO: Confirm exact time with supervisor.
digest._recipient_email_comment: TODO: Fill in supervisor email address (or comma-separated list for multiple recipients).
digest.subject_template: Daily Inbox Report — {{DATE}} — {{TOTAL}} emails processed, {{NEEDS_REVIEW}} need review

google_sheets._master_log_sheet_id_comment: TODO: Paste the Google Sheet ID for the master activity log (from the URL: docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/SHEET_ID/edit).
google_sheets._sop_matrix_sheet_id_comment: TODO: Paste the Google Sheet ID for Britney's SOP matrix.
google_sheets._sop_matrix_tab_prefix_comment: Optional prefix for talent tab names, e.g. 'Talent_'. Leave empty if tabs are named by first name only.

talents.name: Sylvia
talents._gmail_connection_comment: TODO: This must match the exact connection name set up in Make for this talent's Gmail account.
talents._minimum_rate_comment: Per-talent minimum. Overrides global_minimum_rate_usd for this talent.

make._workspace_zone_comment: TODO: Confirm your Make workspace zone (us1, eu1, etc.).
make._error_alert_email_comment: TODO: Email address to receive immediate error alerts when a Make scenario fails or OAuth expires.
